basic.description:
{Basic Scouting}

Basic Scouting increases the hero's scouting radius by 1 tile and grants your player and allied players access to information from 1 level of Thieves' Guild.

advanced.description:
{Advanced Scouting}

Advanced Scouting increases the hero's scouting radius by 2 tiles and grants your player and allied players access to information from 2 levels of Thieves' Guild.

expert.description:
{Expert Scouting}

Expert Scouting increases the hero's scouting radius by 3 tiles and grants your player and allied players access to information from 3 levels of Thieves' Guild.
